prompts.text: {player1}, welcome to chaos. Take 3 sips. The easy ones are over.
{player1}, give out 4 sips to whoever you think will regret playing this pack.
{player1}, scream your name. Take 2 sips. We need to set the tone.
{player1}, give out 3 sips to whoever looks the most sober. Fix that.
{player1}, take 3 sips. You chose this pack. This is your fault.
{player1}, give out 5 sips however you want. No explanation needed. Chaos has no rules.
{player1}, text 'I need to talk to you about something serious' to the 5th contact in your phone. Or take 5 sips.
{player1}, let the group compose a text and send it from your phone. Refuse = 6 sips.
{player1}, show the group your most recent selfie. No deleting first. Refuse = 4 sips.
{player1}, read the last text you sent out loud. Refuse = 5 sips.
{player1}, show your screen time average. Over 5 hours? Take 4 sips. Over 7? Take 6.
{player1}, let someone post on your Instagram story. Nothing permanent. Refuse = 5 sips.
{player1}, call the 3rd contact in your phone. Say 'the eagle has landed' and hang up. Refuse = 5 sips.
{player1}, show your most-played song on Spotify. Group judges. Embarrassing = 3 sips.
{player1}, text your ex 'hey.' Or take 6 sips. Your choice. Choose wisely.
{player1}, let the group go through your camera roll for 10 seconds. Refuse = 6 sips.
{player1}, show the group your search history. Or take 5 sips. No clearing first.
{player1}, send a voice note to a random contact saying 'I've been thinking about us.' Refuse = 5 sips.
{player1}, hold a plank until it's your turn again. Give up early = 3 sips.
{player1}, let someone draw on your face with a marker. Refuse = 5 sips.
{player1}, do your best twerk for 10 seconds or take 4 sips.
{player1}, let someone put an ice cube down your shirt. Refuse = 4 sips.
{player1}, speak in an accent for the next 3 rounds. Break character = 2 sips each time.
{player1}, let someone give you a wet willy. Refuse = 4 sips. Yeah, we went there.
{player1}, take your socks off and put them on your hands for 3 rounds. Refuse = 3 sips.
{player1}, tell the group your most embarrassing moment. Refuse = 5 sips.
{player1}, admit something you've never told anyone here. Refuse = 5 sips.
{player1}, who in this room would you NOT want to be stuck on a desert island with? Say it. Refuse = 4 sips.
{player1}, reveal your body count. Or take 6 sips. The group decides if you're lying.
{player1}, what's the most unhinged thing you've done while drunk? Tell it or take 5 sips.
{player1}, who at this table have you talked about behind their back? Confess or take 5 sips.
{player1}, what's the worst lie you've ever told? Confess or take 4 sips.
{player1}, if you had to date someone at this table, who? Say it or take 5 sips.
{player1}, what's the pettiest thing you've ever done? Tell it or take 4 sips.
{player1}, who's your least favorite person's ex? Spill or take 4 sips.
{player1}, what's on your phone you'd never want anyone to see? Hint at it or take 5 sips.
{player1}, describe your worst date ever. Or take 4 sips.
{player1}, what's the meanest thing you've said about someone at this table? Confess or take 5 sips.
{player1}, what's a red flag you have that you're fully aware of? Take 2 sips of self-awareness.
{player1}, do your best impression of {player2}. If they're not offended enough, take 3 sips.
{player1}, give a 30-second motivational speech to your drink. Take 2 sips when you're done.
{player1}, fake cry for 10 seconds. Not convincing? Take 3 sips.
{player1}, let the group give you a new nickname. You must respond to it for the rest of the game. Refuse = 4 sips.
{player1}, try to make {player2} laugh without touching them. 15 seconds. Fail = 3 sips.
{player1}, sing everything you say for the next round. Speaking normally = 2 sips.
{player1}, act like you just won an Oscar. Give a 15-second acceptance speech. Take 2 sips after.
{player1}, keep a completely straight face for 30 seconds while the group tries to make you laugh. Crack = 4 sips.
{player1}, make eye contact with {player2} for 10 seconds without laughing. First to break takes 3 sips.
{player1}, swap an item of clothing with {player2}. Both refuse = both take 4 sips.
{player1}, let the person to your left give you a dare. Refuse = 5 sips.
{player1}, put your phone in the middle of the table. First person to touch their phone takes 4 sips. Yours included.
{player1}, say 'I love you' to {player2} while maintaining eye contact. Take 2 sips of awkwardness after.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips with your non-dominant hand. Spill = start over.
{player1}, eat a condiment straight. Ketchup, mustard, hot sauce — your choice. Refuse = 5 sips.
{player1}, yell the name of your crush (or celebrity crush) as loud as you can. Refuse = 4 sips.
{player1}, talk in a baby voice for the next 2 rounds. Break character = 2 sips.
{player1}, dramatically pretend to slip and fall right now. Not dramatic enough? Take 3 sips.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. We don't owe you a reason.
{player1}, take 4 sips. The group decided while you weren't looking.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips and like it.
{player1}, take 3 sips for existing. That's the prompt.
{player1}, you look too comfortable. Take 4 sips.
{player1}, you've been too quiet. Take {sip_count} sips.
{player1}, you've been too loud. Take 3 sips. Balance.
{player1}, you haven't sipped in a while. Fix that. Take {sip_count} sips.
{player1}, the vibes are off. Take 4 sips to recalibrate.
{player1}, this is a punishment for something you did in a past life. Take 5 sips.
{player1}, let {player2} type a tweet/post on your phone. You must post it. Refuse = 6 sips.
{player1}, change your profile picture to whatever the group decides. Keep it for 24 hours. Refuse = 5 sips.
{player1}, text 'we need to talk' to the person you texted most recently. Or take 5 sips.
{player1}, open your Venmo/Cash App and show your last 3 transactions. Refuse = 4 sips.
{player1}, show the group the last YouTube video you watched. Refuse = 4 sips.
{player1}, let someone type a message in your group chat. Refuse = 5 sips.
{player1}, call your mom (or a parent) and tell them you love them. On speaker. Refuse = 4 sips.
{player1}, show the group your notes app. Refuse = 5 sips. There's always something weird in there.
{player1}, let someone change your phone wallpaper. Keep it for 24 hours. Refuse = 4 sips.
{player1}, let {player2} style your hair however they want. Keep it for the rest of the game. Refuse = 4 sips.
{player1}, do a lap around the room while crab-walking. Refuse = 4 sips.
{player1}, sit on the floor for the next 3 rounds. Chair privileges revoked. Refuse = 3 sips.
{player1}, hold hands with {player2} until your next turn. Both refuse = both take 4 sips.
{player1}, let someone flick your forehead. Refuse = 3 sips.
{player1}, do a cartwheel or attempt one. Refuse = 4 sips. Bad attempt still counts.
{player1}, talk with your tongue sticking out for 2 rounds. Stop = 2 sips.
{player1}, propose to {player2}. On one knee. Make it dramatic. Refuse = 5 sips.
{player1}, give a eulogy for {player2} as if they just died. 20 seconds. Refuse = 4 sips.
{player1}, pretend you're a news anchor reporting on this party. 15 seconds. Take 2 sips after.
{player1}, act out your morning routine in fast-forward. 15 seconds. Take 2 sips.
{player1}, give {player2} a nickname they have to use for the rest of the game. They refuse = they take 4 sips.
{player1}, argue passionately for 15 seconds that the earth is flat. Not convincing enough (group judges) = 3 sips.
{player1}, order a pizza or food delivery right now for the group. Refuse = 6 sips. Be a hero.
{player1}, try to sell your drink to {player2} like an infomercial. 15 seconds. Not convincing = 3 sips.
{player1}, give a TED talk about why {player2} is the best person at this table. 20 seconds. Take 2 sips after.
{player1}, do your best robot impression for 15 seconds. Not robotic enough = 3 sips.
{player1}, who here do you trust the most? Now who do you trust the least? Take 3 sips for the honesty.
{player1}, rate everyone's outfit at this table 1-10. Out loud. Take 1 sip per person you rate under 5.
{player1}, what's the most annoying thing about {player2}? Say it. Refuse = 5 sips.
{player1}, if you could uninvite one person from this game, who? Take 3 sips.
{player1}, who at this table do you think is secretly mean? Take 3 sips.
{player1}, what's a secret you know about someone here? Hint at it without saying names. Refuse = 5 sips.
{player1}, rank the people at this table from funniest to least funny. Take 1 sip per complaint.
{player1}, who here would you NOT follow back on Instagram? Say it. Take 3 sips.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever you'd least want to share a bathroom with.
{player1}, give 4 sips to the most annoying person at this table. Say it to their face.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever would survive the least time in prison.
{player1}, give {sip_count} sips to whoever is faking having fun right now.
{player1}, give 4 sips to whoever would be the worst parent.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever has the most audacity at this table.
{player1}, give 4 sips to whoever smells the worst right now. Be honest.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever would crack first under interrogation.
{player1}, give {sip_count} sips to whoever peaked in high school.
{player1}, give 4 sips to whoever is most likely to end up on a true crime podcast.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever you'd trust the LEAST with a secret.
{player1}, give 4 sips to whoever would be the worst roommate.
{player1}, give {sip_count} sips to whoever has the most toxic trait at this table.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever is the biggest menace to society here.
{player1}, give 4 sips to whoever you'd least want to be stuck in an elevator with.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever has the worst takes on everything.
{player1}, give {sip_count} sips to whoever would embarrass you the most in public.
{player1}, give 4 sips to whoever is the most likely to ghost someone.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever would fold first in a staring contest.
{player1}, give 4 sips to whoever you think is lying about something right now.
{player1}, close your eyes and point. Whoever you're pointing at takes 5 sips.
{player1}, give out 6 sips total — but at least 3 must go to one person.
{player1}, the person sitting furthest from you takes 4 sips. Geography is destiny.
{player1}, everyone whose name has more than 5 letters takes 2 sips. You don't make the rules. Oh wait, you do.
{player1}, give {sip_count} sips to whoever last went to the bathroom.
{player1}, give 4 sips to whoever is wearing the most clothing. Layers are suspicious.
{player1}, give out {sip_count} sips to whoever last checked their phone.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever has the longest hair. Follicle punishment.
{player1}, spin an imaginary bottle. Whoever it 'lands' on takes 4 sips. Your aim is final.
{player1}, give 4 sips to the person directly across from you. Eye contact mandatory.
{player1}, give 3 sips to the tallest person at the table.
{player1}, give out {sip_count} sips split evenly between the two people closest to you.
{player1}, give 4 sips to whoever has the nicest shoes. Punishment for drip.
{player1}, give 3 sips to whoever last said a swear word.
{player1}, the person to your left takes 3 sips. The person to your right takes 3 sips. You take 1. Life's not fair.
{player1}, give out 8 sips total however you want. Go nuclear.
{player1}, give 4 sips to whoever ordered the fanciest drink.
{player1}, give {sip_count} sips to whoever is wearing the least clothing.
{player1}, give 3 sips to the youngest person here. Youth is not a defense.
{player1}, give 4 sips to whoever you'd pick last for a team.
{player1}, give out as many sips as exes you have. Max 6. Zero? Take 3, what are you hiding?
{player1}, give out as many sips as times you've been pulled over. Max 5. Zero? Take 1.
{player1}, give out as many sips as times you've been kicked out of somewhere. Max 5. Zero? Take 1.
{player1}, give out as many sips as jobs you've been fired from. Max 5. Zero? Lucky. Take 1.
{player1}, give out as many sips as speeding tickets you've gotten. Max 5.
{player1}, give out as many sips as times you've cried this month. Max 5. Zero? Liar, take 3.
{player1}, give out as many sips as dating apps on your phone right now. Max 5. Zero? Sure. Take 2.
{player1}, give out as many sips as hours of sleep you got last night. Max 6. Under 5? Take 3.
{player1}, give out as many sips as unread texts you have right now. Divide by 10, max 6.
{player1}, give out as many sips as embarrassing photos of you that exist somewhere. Estimate, max 6.
{player1}, give out as many sips as times you've been in the ER. Max 5.
{player1}, give out as many sips as fights you've been in. Max 5. Zero? Peaceful. Take 1.
Waterfall! {player1} starts drinking. Each person starts when the person before them does. Don't stop until they stop.
Everyone put your phone face-down on the table. First person to flip theirs over in the next 3 rounds takes 5 sips.
Everyone who has stalked an ex on social media this week — take 3 sips.
Everyone who has a 'finsta' or secret social media account — take 3 sips.
Everyone who has lied to someone at this table — take {sip_count} sips.
Everyone who has hooked up with someone in this room — take 4 sips. Keep it vague.
Everyone who has screenshot someone's story to gossip about it — take 3 sips.
Everyone who has pretended to be busy to avoid someone — take 2 sips.
Everyone who has blocked someone and unblocked them — take 3 sips.
Everyone who has cried in public — take 2 sips.
Everyone who has a secret they haven't told anyone at this table — take 3 sips.
Everyone who has googled themselves — take 2 sips of narcissism.
Everyone who has double-texted someone who left them on read — take 3 sips of desperation.
Everyone who has been in a friend group chat that talks about someone in this room — take 4 sips.
Everyone who has faked being sick to avoid plans — take 2 sips.
Everyone who has ghosted someone — take 3 sips.
Everyone who has sent a risky text they immediately regretted — take {sip_count} sips.
Everyone who has been kicked out of a bar, club, or establishment — take 4 sips and explain.
Everyone who has thrown up from drinking — take 3 sips. You know who you are.
Everyone who has woken up not knowing where they were — take 4 sips.
Everyone who has had a one-night stand — take 3 sips.
Everyone who has been in a fight — take 3 sips.
Everyone who has been pulled over — take 2 sips.
Everyone who has been arrested or detained — take 5 sips. We have questions.
Everyone who has broken something at someone else's house and not told them — take 3 sips.
Everyone who has peed in a pool — take 3 sips. Don't lie.
Everyone who went to bed after 2 AM last night — take 3 sips.
Everyone who has less than 20% battery right now — take 2 sips. Living dangerously.
Everyone who didn't shower today — take 3 sips.
Everyone whose room is messy RIGHT NOW — take 3 sips.
Everyone who has re-worn dirty clothes — take {sip_count} sips of honesty.
Everyone who has over 1000 unread emails — take 3 sips of chaos.
Everyone who has no idea what day of the week it is — take 2 sips.
Everyone take 2 sips. No reason. This is unhinged. Move on.
Everyone who made eye contact with someone during this prompt — both of you take 3 sips.
Everyone who just sighed — take 3 sips. We heard that.
Everyone who checked their phone in the last 5 minutes — take 2 sips.
Everyone who is thinking about food right now — take 2 sips.
Everyone who was about to say 'I don't do that' to the last prompt — take 3 sips. Yes you do.
Last person to raise their hand takes 4 sips. Raise your hand NOW.
Everyone who is currently sitting cross-legged — take 2 sips.
Everyone who can't touch their toes — take 3 sips and try.
Everyone who has ever peed outside — take 2 sips.
Everyone who has a weird food combo they love — take 2 sips and confess it.
Everyone who has seen someone at this table cry — take 2 sips. Keep the details to yourself.
Everyone who is actually having fun right now — give out 2 sips. Not having fun? Take 4.
Everyone who has road rage — take {sip_count} sips.
Everyone who has lied during this game — take 4 sips. That's everyone.
On 3, point to the person most likely to end up in jail. They take 4 sips.
On 3, point to the biggest liar at this table. They take 4 sips.
On 3, point to the person with the worst dating history. They take 3 sips.
On 3, point to the biggest drama queen. They take 4 sips.
On 3, point to whoever peaked in high school. They take {sip_count} sips.
On 3, point to the person most likely to start a fight tonight. They take 4 sips.
On 3, point to whoever has the messiest room. They take 3 sips.
On 3, point to whoever would be the worst at keeping a secret. They take 4 sips.
On 3, point to the person most likely to get cancelled. They take {sip_count} sips.
On 3, point to whoever would embarrass you the most in front of your parents. They take 4 sips.
On 3, point to the person most likely to start a cult. They take 3 sips.
On 3, point to the person you'd trust the LEAST with your phone. They take 4 sips.
On 3, point to whoever tells the most exaggerated stories. They take 3 sips.
On 3, point to the biggest clown at this table. They take {sip_count} sips.
On 3, point to whoever would be the worst wingman. They take 3 sips.
On 3, point to the person you'd never want to road trip with. They take 3 sips.
On 3, point to whoever has the most toxic ex. They take {sip_count} sips.
On 3, point to whoever gives the worst advice. They take 4 sips.
On 3, point to the person who'd eat something off the ground for $5. They take 3 sips.
On 3, point to the person most likely to go viral for the wrong reasons. They take {sip_count} sips.
On 3, point to the biggest people-pleaser. They take 3 sips.
On 3, point to whoever is the most chaotic person here. They give out 4 sips. Chaos is rewarded.
On 3, point to the person you'd least want as your lawyer. They take 4 sips.
On 3, point to the most delusional person at this table. They take {sip_count} sips.
On 3, point to whoever has the worst music taste. They take 3 sips.
On 3, point to whoever would sell you out for $100. They take 4 sips.
On 3, point to the person who talks the most trash but can't back it up. They take 4 sips.
On 3, point to whoever you'd least want as a coworker. They take 3 sips.
On 3, point to whoever would be the worst at flirting. They take {sip_count} sips.
On 3, point to whoever would be the worst at lying to a cop. They take 4 sips.
On 3, point to whoever has the most red flags. They take {sip_count} sips.
On 3, point to the person who has the most unresolved drama. They take 4 sips.
On 3, point to whoever would be the worst therapist. They take 3 sips.
On 3, point to the person who'd survive the shortest in Squid Game. They take {sip_count} sips.
On 3, point to whoever has the biggest ego. They take 4 sips.
On 3, point to the person most likely to become a conspiracy theorist. They take 3 sips.
On 3, point to whoever is secretly judging everyone right now. They take 4 sips.
On 3, point to the person most likely to fake their own death. They take 3 sips.
On 3, point to whoever would be the worst president. They take {sip_count} sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Thumb war. Best of 3. Loser takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Staring contest. First to blink or laugh takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Arm wrestle. Loser takes 5 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who can hold a plank longer? Loser takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Mercy! (finger-bending). Loser takes {sip_count} sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Dance-off. 15 seconds each. Group votes. Loser takes 5 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Rock paper scissors. Best of 5. Loser takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Try not to laugh. Group tries to crack you both. First to break takes {sip_count} sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Hold your drink with one finger as long as possible. First to drop it takes 5 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Balance a coaster on your head. First to drop it takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who has fewer Instagram followers? Loser takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who texted their ex more recently? They take 5 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who has more screen time today? They take 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who went to bed later last night? They take 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Show your most recent photo. Group picks the worse one. Loser takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who has more unread messages? They take 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who can name more countries in 15 seconds? Loser takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name bad habits back and forth. First to hesitate takes {sip_count} sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name celebrities back and forth. First to blank takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name excuses for being late. First to fail takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name red flags in dating back and forth. First to blank takes {sip_count} sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name things you should never say on a first date. First to hesitate takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name fast food restaurants. First to blank takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name things that are illegal but feel like they shouldn't be. First to fail takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name fears/phobias back and forth. First to blank takes {sip_count} sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name conspiracy theories. First to hesitate takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who can do the best impression of {player3}? Group votes. Loser takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Dad joke battle. Each tell one. Group votes worst. Loser takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who can do a more convincing fake laugh? Group votes. Loser takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Most convincing fake cry in 5 seconds. Group votes. Loser takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Best pickup line. Group votes. Loser takes {sip_count} sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Best insult (keep it friendly). Group votes. Loser takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who can do the better accent? Group picks the accent. Loser takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Best animal impression. Group votes. Loser takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: You're both taking 3 sips. But one of you takes an extra 2. You decide between yourselves in 10 seconds. Can't agree? Both take 5.
{player1} vs {player2}: Flip a coin. Heads = {player1} takes 5. Tails = {player2} takes 5. Fate decides.
{player1} vs {player2}: Both of you take 2 sips. Then each point to who should drink more. If you point at each other, both take 3 more.
{player1} vs {player2}: One of you is lying about something right now. Group decides who. That person takes 5 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Speed sip. Both start drinking on 3. First to stop takes 3 additional sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Both reveal your battery percentage. Lower battery takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Both say a number 1-10 on 3. If they match, everyone else drinks 3. If not, the lower number drinks 4.
{player1} vs {player2}: The group asks you both the same question. Best answer wins. Loser takes {sip_count} sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Name something embarrassing about the other person. Whoever gets the bigger reaction from the group wins. Loser takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Both say one word that describes the other. Most accurate (group votes) wins. Loser takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Guess each other's middle name. Both wrong = both take 3. One right = wrong guesser takes 5.
{player1} vs {player2}: Who has the older phone? Older phone takes 3 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Both check your bank accounts. Whoever has less takes 4 sips. Refuse = 5 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Each reveal your worst habit. Group votes on who's worse. They take {sip_count} sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Compliment battle. Go back and forth complimenting each other. First to get awkward or laugh takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Roast battle. One roast each. Group picks the winner. Loser takes 5 sips.
No first names for {rule_turns} rounds. Use insults, nicknames, or descriptions. Real name = 3 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: Names are back. You can be civil again.

prompts.text: No saying 'drink,' 'sip,' or 'shot' for {rule_turns} rounds. Say it = 3 sips.
{player1} is the Dictator. They add 1 extra sip to ANY prompt for {rule_turns} rounds.
Everyone must make eye contact with whoever they're giving sips to for {rule_turns} rounds. No eye contact = your sips are void.
No laughing for {rule_turns} rounds. Laugh = 3 sips.
Everyone must drink with their non-dominant hand for {rule_turns} rounds. Wrong hand = 2 sips.
No crossing your legs or arms for {rule_turns} rounds. Cross = 2 sips.
{player1} is the Parole Officer. They can add a dare to anyone's sip penalty for {rule_turns} rounds. Refuse = double sips.
Must say 'respectfully' before every insult or roast for {rule_turns} rounds. Forget = 2 sips.
No using the word 'like' for {rule_turns} rounds. Say it = 2 sips.
Must whisper for {rule_turns} rounds. Normal volume = 3 sips.
After every sip, you must say 'thank you, may I have another.' Forget = extra sip. {rule_turns} rounds.
{player1} picks a word that's banned for {rule_turns} rounds. Say it = 3 sips.
Everyone must stand while drinking for {rule_turns} rounds. Sitting = 3 extra sips.
Must high-five someone after giving out sips for {rule_turns} rounds. No high-five = sips don't count.
No putting your drink down for {rule_turns} rounds. Put it down = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: You may put your drink down.

prompts.text: {player1} is the Snitch. If they catch anyone breaking a rule, that person takes double. {rule_turns} rounds.
Must clap once before each sip for {rule_turns} rounds. Forget = extra sip.
No saying anyone's name — point instead. Say a name = 3 sips. {rule_turns} rounds.
Double trouble! All sip counts are doubled for {rule_turns} rounds. Yeah. Good luck.
prompts.rule_end_text: Double sips are over. Back to single chaos.

prompts.text: Must compliment the person giving you sips before drinking for {rule_turns} rounds. No compliment = extra sip.
{player1} is the Bartender. They choose who drinks first when multiple people owe sips for {rule_turns} rounds.
Everyone must wink after drinking for {rule_turns} rounds. Forget = extra sip.
No one can use their thumbs for {rule_turns} rounds. Use a thumb = 2 sips.
{player1} is the Judge. If anyone argues about a prompt, {player1} decides the punishment. {rule_turns} rounds.
Must do a dramatic pause before every sip for {rule_turns} rounds. Too fast = extra sip.
No one can sit in the same seat. Musical chairs — everyone shifts one seat left NOW. This is the new order for {rule_turns} rounds.
prompts.rule_end_text: Return to your original seats. Or don't. Chaos.

prompts.text: Must maintain eye contact with the person across from you while drinking for {rule_turns} rounds.
prompts.rule_end_text: Eye contact rule over. Look away.

prompts.text: Every time someone says 'what,' they take 1 sip for {rule_turns} rounds. What?
Half-speed! All sip counts are halved (round up) for {rule_turns} rounds. Enjoy the mercy.
prompts.rule_end_text: Full sip counts restored. Mercy over.

prompts.text: {player1}, keep a straight face while the group roasts you for 20 seconds. Crack = {sip_count} sips.
{player1}, tell a joke. If nobody laughs, take 4 sips. If everyone laughs, give out 4.
{player1}, do your best impression of someone at this table. Group guesses who. Wrong guess = you take 3 sips.
{player1}, name 7 swear words in 10 seconds or take 4 sips. Censored versions don't count.
{player1}, tell a story in exactly 10 words. Over or under = {sip_count} sips.
{player1}, describe {player2} using only 3 words. If they're offended, take 3 sips.
{player1}, make the group laugh in 15 seconds without touching anyone. Fail = 4 sips.
{player1}, speak for 15 seconds without using the letter 'S.' Fail = 3 sips.
{player1}, name 5 things that are illegal in 10 seconds or take 3 sips.
{player1}, name 3 things about {player2} that annoy you. Refuse = 5 sips. Be brave.
{player1}, start a category: things you shouldn't say at work. Go around — first to fail takes 4 sips.
{player1}, give a 15-second roast of {player2}. If the group says it was weak, take 4 sips.
{player1}, name 5 things that would get you fired in 10 seconds or take 4 sips.
{player1}, start a category: things you shouldn't do on a first date. Go around — first to fail takes 3 sips.
{player1}, start a category: things that make someone undateable. Go around — first to fail takes 4 sips.
{player1}, say something nice about everyone at the table in 30 seconds. Skip someone = they give you 3 sips.
{player1}, come up with a pickup line for {player2} in 10 seconds. Group rates it. Under 5/10 = take 3 sips.
{player1}, start a category: reasons to break up with someone. Go around — first to fail takes 4 sips.
{player1}, name 5 reasons you'd be a bad partner in 10 seconds or take 4 sips. Self-awareness check.
{player1}, name 3 things in {player2}'s fridge without looking. Wrong = {sip_count} sips.
{player1}, start a category: worst things to say at a job interview. Go around — first to fail takes 3 sips.
{player1}, start a category: things you'd never admit to your parents. Go around — first to fail takes 4 sips.
{player1}, compliment and insult {player2} in the same sentence. Group judges — fail = 3 sips.
{player1}, describe your love life using only a movie title. Group judges — bad answer = 4 sips.
{player1}, start a category: things you'd do for $1 million. Go around — first to hesitate takes 4 sips.
{player1}, start a category: the worst things to say to a cop. Go around — first to fail takes 4 sips.
{player1}, start a category: things that are technically legal but shouldn't be. Go around — first to fail takes 3 sips.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. The chaos gods demand tribute.
{player1}, take 5 sips. No reason. This is the unhinged pack.
{player1}, finish whatever's in your glass. Or take 6 sips. Pick your poison.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips while the group counts each one out loud.
{player1}, take 5 sips. Then give out 3. Then take 2 more. We're not done.
{player1}, chug for 5 seconds straight. Whatever's left? Take 3 more sips.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips back to back. No pausing between.
{player1}, take a punishment sip for every person at the table. Big group energy.
{player1}, take 4 sips. Then spin around once. Then take 2 more.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips with your eyes closed.
{player1}, take 5 sips. If you make a face, take 2 more.
{player1}, take a sip for every year you've been alive. Just kidding. Take {sip_count} sips.
{player1}, take 4 sips. The person to your left also takes 2. Collateral damage.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. If you complain, add 2 more.
{player1}, take 6 sips. This is the penalty box. You live here now.
{player1}, everyone at the table gives you 1 sip. Add them up. Drink up.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. Then say 'thank you.' Manners in chaos.
{player1}, take 5 sips. Each person at the table stares at you while you do it.
{player1}, take 4 sips. You were too confident. This is humbling.
{player1}, take {sip_count} sips. Then dare someone. If they refuse, they join you in the penalty box.
Heaven! Last person to point up takes 5 sips. REACT NOW!
Floor! Last person to touch the ground takes 5 sips.
{player1}, truth or dare? Group picks the truth question or dare. Weak answer = 5 sips.
Social! Everyone clinks and takes 3 sips. No exceptions. This is mandatory fun.
{player1}, flip a coin. Heads = everyone drinks 3. Tails = you drink 6. The coin decides all.
Chaos Vote! Everyone secretly writes a dare on their phone. {player1} picks one at random and must do it. Refuse = 6 sips.
{player1}, hot seat! Everyone asks you one yes-or-no question. Every 'no' = 1 sip. Every lie the group catches = 3 sips.
Russian Roulette! Go around the table. Each person takes 1 sip. When {player1} says STOP, whoever was mid-sip takes 5 more.
Confessional! Go around. Everyone admits one thing they've done that no one at the table knows. Most shocking one (group votes) gives out 5 sips.
Purge round! For the next prompt only, all sip counts are tripled. Brace yourselves.
{player1}, let the group compose and send one text from your phone. No veto. Take 3 sips of anxiety while they type.
{player1}, show the group your screen time report. Over 6 hours? Take that many sips. Under 3? Take 1 sip, you liar.
{player1}, let someone at this table post one Instagram story from your phone. No previews. Take 3 sips.
{player1}, read the last thing you copied on your clipboard out loud. Take 2 sips regardless.
{player1}, call the 5th contact in your recent calls on speaker. Say "we need to talk" and hang up after 10 seconds. Refuse? Take 6 sips.
{player1}, let the group change your phone wallpaper to whatever they want. It stays for 24 hours. Refuse? Take 5 sips.
{player1}, Venmo someone random $0.01 with the message "sorry about last night." Show proof or take 5 sips.
{player1}, show the last TikTok or Reel you liked. Group judges. Embarrassing? Take 3 sips. Boring? Take 4.
{player1}, read your most recent text conversation out loud for 30 seconds. No skipping. Take 2 sips after.
{player1}, DM "hey stranger" to the 7th person in your DMs. Screenshot it. Refuse? Take 5 sips.
{player1}, show the group your most-listened-to song this week. Group roasts it. Take 1 sip per roast.
{player1}, let the group scroll your camera roll for 15 seconds. Anything they find interesting? Take 3 sips and explain.
{player1}, rank everyone at this table by who you'd call in a real emergency. Explain why the last person is last. They take 4 sips.
{player1}, tell {player2} the honest reason you'd never date them. Be specific. They take 3 sips of truth.
{player1}, roast {player2}'s outfit. Be specific. Be mean. They take 2 sips. You take 2 for being terrible.
{player1}, tell {player2} what their dating profile probably says vs. what it should say. They take 3 sips.
{player1}, if {player2} were a reality TV villain, what would their catchphrase be? Say it to their face. They take 3 sips.
{player1}, rate {player2}'s chances of being married in 5 years. 1-10. Explain your score. They take 3 sips either way.
{player1}, tell the group who here you'd cut from the friend group first. Explain. They take 5 sips.
{player1}, what job would {player2} be absolutely terrible at? Tell them why. They take 3 sips.
{player1}, describe {player2}'s love life as a movie genre. Explain. They take 3 sips.
{player1}, give {player2} a brutally honest Yelp review as a person. Star rating and all. They take 3 sips.
{player1}, tell {player2} the emoji that best represents their personality. Defend your choice. They take 2 sips.
{player1}, what is {player2}'s biggest red flag? Say it to their face. No sugarcoating. Both take 3 sips.
{player1}, wear your shirt inside-out for the rest of the game. Refuse? Take 5 sips every round until you do.
{player1}, let someone draw whatever they want on your arm with a marker. They choose. You suffer. Take 2 sips.
{player1}, hold an ice cube in your fist until it melts. Drop it? Take 4 sips and start over.
{player1}, let the group vote on a new hairstyle for you. You keep it for the rest of the night. Refuse? Take 6 sips.
{player1}, do your best impression of {player2}. The group rates it 1-10. Under 5? Take 3 sips. Over 5? {player2} takes 3.
{player1}, let the group give you a new name for the rest of the game. You must respond to ONLY that name. Forget? Take 3 sips each time.
{player1}, eat a condiment of the group's choosing straight from the packet. Refuse? Take 5 sips. No negotiation.
{player1}, call a random number in your contacts and compliment whoever answers for 15 seconds straight. On speaker. Refuse? Take 6 sips.
Everyone swap drinks with the person across from you. You're stuck with it for the next 3 rounds. No complaints.
Everyone hand your phone to the person on your left. They have 15 seconds to do whatever they want. No take-backs.
On 3, everyone point at who they think is lying about something right now. Most votes? Confess something real or take 6 sips.
Everyone close your eyes. Point at who you think is the most fake. Open eyes. Most votes confesses something genuine or takes 5 sips.
Everyone text "I miss you" to their most recent ex right now. Show proof or take 5 sips. No exceptions.
Everyone who has screenshots of someone at this table on their phone — take 3 sips. We know you do.
Rock paper scissors tournament. Everyone plays the person to their right. All losers drink 3 sips. Winners play each other until one champion remains. Champion gives out 5.
Everyone give your phone to {player1}. They read the most recent notification from each one out loud. Take 2 sips per notification.
Stand up if you've ever lied to someone at this table about something that matters. Standers take 3 sips. Sitters? Probably lying. Take 4.
Everyone show your last selfie to the group. Group votes on the worst one. Worst selfie takes 4 sips of shame.
Everyone share the last lie they told. Group votes on whose was the worst. Winner of worst lie takes 5 sips.
Everyone who has a crush on someone at this table — make eye contact with them right now. Don't make eye contact? Take 4 sips, coward.
{player1}, pick someone. They have to unlock their phone and let you scroll for 15 seconds. They take 3 sips of anxiety.
{player1}, pick 2 people. They must compliment each other for 30 seconds straight without stopping. First to stumble takes 4 sips.
{player1}, assign someone a dare they must complete before the game ends. They can't refuse — only negotiate the terms.
{player1}, pick someone to roast you for 30 seconds. You can't defend yourself. Then give them sips based on accuracy — 1 to 5.
{player1}, give 5 sips to whoever you've stalked most on social media. They probably don't know. Now they do.
{player1}, pick two people. They must maintain eye contact for 30 seconds without laughing. First to break takes 4 sips.
{player1}, pick someone. Read their last sent text message out loud to the group. They take 3 sips of exposure.
{player1}, give 3 sips to someone and tell them the REAL reason. No jokes. Mean it.
{player1}, pick someone to be your servant for the next 3 rounds. They fetch drinks, hold your phone, and take 1 extra sip per round.
{player1}, pick someone. You both share your most embarrassing phone photo. Group votes whose is worse. Loser takes 4 sips.
On 3, point to who is carrying the biggest secret right now. Most votes? Spill something real or take 6 sips.
On 3, point to who would sell you out for $100. Most votes must explain themselves or take 5 sips.
On 3, point to who would fold first under interrogation. Most votes takes 4 sips and must confess something immediately.
On 3, point to who talks the most trash behind people's backs. Most votes — name someone and what you said. Or take 6 sips.
On 3, point to who you'd be most afraid to drunk text. Most votes takes 4 sips and must compose (but not send) a drunk text to prove why.
On 3, point to who has the most to hide on their phone. Most votes? Unlock it for 10 seconds or take 6 sips.
On 3, point to who is secretly the meanest person here. Most votes must say something genuinely nice about everyone or take 5 sips.
On 3, point to who has changed the most since you first met them. Most votes — tell us what changed. Take 3 sips either way.
{player1} vs {player2}: Roast battle. 30 seconds each. Group votes. Loser takes 5 sips. No crying.
{player1} vs {player2}: Both pull up your screen time. Higher screen time takes 3 sips per hour of difference.
{player1} vs {player2}: Both show your most embarrassing saved photo. Group votes whose is worse. Loser takes 5 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Race to text your mom "I love you." Last to get a reply takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Go back and forth naming each other's red flags. First to hesitate or repeat takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Both share the last lie you told someone. Group votes whose was worse. Loser takes 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Rate each other 1-10 out loud. Explain why. Whoever rates lower takes the difference in sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Trade phones. You each have 20 seconds to find something embarrassing. Whoever finds worse material gives out 4 sips.
{player1} vs {player2}: Stare into each other's eyes for 30 seconds. First to look away takes 4 sips AND must confess a secret about the other person.
{player1} vs {player2}: Both describe each other's worst habit in 3 words. Group votes whose was more accurate. Loser takes 4 sips.
Start a category: things that would get you cancelled. Go around. First to blank or refuse takes 5 sips.
Start a category: red flags in a relationship. Go around. First to hesitate takes 4 sips.
{player1}, name 3 things you genuinely dislike about yourself in 10 seconds. Can't? Take 5 sips. Honesty hurts.
Go around. Everyone gives a one-word description of {player1}. If {player1} takes offense to any of them, that person takes 3 sips. If {player1} agrees, they take 2.
Speed round: go around saying "I'm sorry for..." to the person on your left. Must be real. Take 2 sips after each apology.
Start a category: reasons someone at this table is single. Go around. First to blank takes 4 sips. Getting personal? Good.
{player1}, tell a true story about yourself that nobody here knows. If it shocks nobody, take 4 sips. You're not as interesting as you think.
Start a category: things you'd confess on your deathbed. Go around. First to hesitate takes 5 sips. Get real.
Chaos switch! Everyone moves 2 seats to the right. Your new neighbors are your allies for 5 rounds. Betray them? 4 sips.
The Hot Seat. {player1} sits in the middle. Everyone asks them one question they MUST answer honestly. Lie detected by group vote? 5 sips per lie.
Alliance round! Pick a partner. For the next 5 rounds, you split all sips between you. But if one betrays the other (refuses to split), the betrayer takes 8.
Revenge round! Anyone who's been targeted in the last 3 rounds can now assign 3 sips to whoever targeted them. Payback is immediate.
Immunity auction! {player1} is immune to all sip penalties this round. But everyone else's sips are doubled. Chaos has a price.
